_meta.note: DWV and water-supply pipe sizing thresholds for quick field reference. DWV ladder from IPC Table 710.1 (horizontal branch, standard slope). Supply ladder is a simplified Hunter's-curve derived lookup — NOT a replacement for a full pressure-loss calc on long runs.
sources: 2021 IPC Table 710.1 — Building Drains and Sewers
2021 IPC §604 and Hunter's curve (ASPE Data Book)
_meta.disclaimer: Informational. Developed length, slope, velocity, pressure loss, and vent sizing not evaluated. Verify with AHJ.
